name: Major Campaign Win Celebration
description: Premium celebration content for CL victories. Maximum energy, elevated production, and CL-specific visual effects to mark a European night triumph.

subheadline.example: A magical night under the Main Venue lights

guidelines: Maximum production value. Use celebration footage with gold confetti and starball burst effects. CL anthem as the audio foundation. Gold accent color replaces standard blue accent for CL victories. Slow-motion crowd and player celebration shots. This is a marquee moment — no detail spared. Suitable for Reels and TikTok with premium editing. Keep for the highlight reel.
